fills.note: Standard Ruth pilot BCD ref; reviewer confirms canonical ref.

fills.value_json: {"_note":"MM Section 1 marks both scenes shifting to INTIMATE at scene level (the dawn's hushed privacy; the two women alone again). No moment-level register shift and no NARRATIVE_FRAMING override are marked.","scene_level":[{"scene_id":"S1","override_value":"INTIMATE"},{"scene_id":"S2","override_value":"INTIMATE"}],"moment_level":null}
fills.note: Pericope register stays INFORMAL_CASUAL (NARRATIVE); both scene-level overrides to INTIMATE are explicitly marked in the MM's multi-level tagging.

Arc: dawn secrecy rule (SECRECY_INJUNCTION), the six measures answering Naomi's 1:21 reqam — the emptying-to-filling turn (EMPTYING_REVERSED), the morning's who-are-you + report (RECOGNITION_EXCHANGE), Naomi's sit-still handing the matter to the man (INITIATIVE_HANDOFF). Near-miss for the secrecy element was PROTECTIVE_INSTRUCTION, but the load-bearing meaning here is concealment of the night, not protection of a person.

vocabulary_additions.justification: MM 2.1/2.4: Boaz says the night's one rule out loud — 'let it not be known that the woman came to the floor'; the whole scene closes under this rule of secrecy. No approved arc_element names a concealment injunction (PROTECTIVE_INSTRUCTION is about safeguarding a person, not enjoining secrecy).

MM 2.4 names 'the structural turn from emptying to filling, carried in six measures of barley' — Naomi's 1:21 reqam answered negated. EMPTYING is approved for the loss in P01; its deliberate reversal here has no approved token.

fills.note: Floor/town/home (PHYSICAL_LOCATION); mother-in-law/daughter-in-law roles (KINSHIP_CONTEXT); the redeemer 'matter' moving to the gate (INSTITUTIONAL_CONTEXT); dawn/morning/today (TEMPORAL_CONTEXT); the 3:9 question echo, the 2:21 report pattern, and the reqam of 1:21 require prior-text awareness (AUDIENCE_KNOWLEDGE_CONTEXT, PRIOR_PERICOPE_CARRY_FORWARD).
'Hushed' → QUIET; 'deliberately still / a held breath' → STILLED; the legal day in front and secrecy giving way to confidence → ANTICIPATORY.
Dawn's short motions → BRISK; the homecoming quickens → RISES; ends slowing all the way down → SLOWED; the held breath before the legal day → HOLDS.

Closes the threshing-floor scene (CLOSES); answers/re-sounds the 1:21 empty-word (REACTIVATES); completes the naming-down — no names spoken (WITHHOLDS); hands the story to the gate (ADVANCES); ends on the wait-formula the gate scene fulfills (STAGES).
Ruth's scene function; she remains the Moabite daughter-in-law throughout (kept unnamed as 'the woman').
MM marks her as 'the woman' in Boaz's secrecy word — part of the pericope-wide naming-down; register-critical, preserved.
Boaz, the redeemer-pledged kinsman whose matter this now is.
MM: never named in this pericope — only 'he' in S1 and 'the man' later; naming-down preserved.

The secrecy word and the cloak instruction dominate the dialogue; the scene also carries the weighed gift and Boaz's departure. Near-miss DEPARTURE_SCENE (he goes into town); INSTRUCTION_SCENE chosen for the two load-bearing instructions.
Naomi is the gift's homeward aim ('sends its meaning home'; 'do not go empty to your mother-in-law'); appended as REFERENCED in S1.
Naomi asks, hears the report, reads the man. PLANNER also applies (she counsels), but she is named throughout as 'her mother-in-law' and the gift addresses her role.
MM: 'her mother-in-law' — her name not spoken; naming-down preserved.
Ruth, questioned, reporter, bearer of the six measures.
MM: 'my daughter' in Naomi's mouth; intimate address form, name not spoken.
Boaz, reported on (REFERENCED) — the matter is his today.
MM: only 'the man' (3:16, 3:18); his name rests until the gate.
Ruth's full report home with the gift as proof, plus Naomi's reading/counsel; REPORT_SCENE captures the dominant beat.
She lay at the place of his feet until morning. No approved proposition_kind names lying/reclining.

vocabulary_additions.justification: MM P1: 'lying — who lay? she — at the place of his feet, until the morning.' No approved kind covers reclining/lying down (SAT, PROSTRATED, ROSE, REMAINED do not fit).

fills.note: Preserves margelot (CB_0042, fourth and final night-scene occurrence) and the 'the woman' naming.
FIG_0150 gray-light frame preserved as the timing slot.
The secrecy injunction (FIG_0151); subject of the protected fact named down to 'the woman'.
Command (DIRECTED idiom) plus her compliance folded as a slot; garment is the mitpachat carried under O13.
The marked act is measuring (FIG_0152, six measures, unit left unsaid), distinct from a plain GAVE/HANDED.

vocabulary_additions.justification: MM P5: 'measuring — measured six measures of barley — laid it on her.' FIG_0152 foregrounds the measuring with the measure-unit deliberately unspecified; GAVE/HANDED would lose the measuring act the text marks.

fills.note: measure_unit UNSPECIFIED preserves the text's open 'six of barley' (FIG_0152).
He goes into the town; from the floor this is his departure/exit.
MM notes the text moves him into town first; preserved as a distinct proposition.
She comes to her mother-in-law.
The question's nature is carried by the speech_act; SPOKE chosen over a mint since the discourse act is a spoken question.
FIG_0154: the 3:9 'who are you' doubled into the morning's mouth; question kept open across recognition, identity, and changed standing.
Ruth's report; reporting nuance carried in slots/speech_act rather than minting.
FIG_0155: only 'the man'. Naomi's question gets no direct name-answer; the report stands in its place (significant absence preserved).
She physically displays the six measures as proof — a display act, not speech and not a plain give.

vocabulary_additions.justification: MM P10: 'showing — what did she show? these six measures of barley.' The gift is laid out as evidence; no approved kind covers displaying/presenting an object as proof (GAVE/HANDED is the original transfer, not the showing).

fills.note: FIG_0152 second occurrence (the same six measures, now shown).
paired_with P5 — the same six measures measured at the floor, now shown at home.
Ruth reports Boaz's prior words; the reported-instruction nature is carried by the speech_act.

FIG_0153 (cross-pericope pair) closes here at 3:17, opened at 1:21; the reqam lament-word returns negated and aimed at Naomi (CB_0044/CB_0024/CB_0043). Heard only through Ruth — the narrator never showed Boaz saying it (significant absence preserved).
Naomi's counsel 'sit still' encoded as a directive (DIRECTED idiom) with the commanded step as content.
The held-breath stillness; matter (davar) carried under O19.
The counsel is grounded in P13 (the man will not rest) — consequence of the reason stated next; marked caused_by P13 though P13 is textually subsequent.
Naomi's assertion about the man's certain resolve — the grounds for her counsel.

FIG_0155 (only 'the man') and FIG_0156 (the-man-will-not-rest wait-formula); cross-pericope pair opens here at 3:18 and is fulfilled by the gate scene (P11 of the next pericope). 'today' carried under TM_TODAY.
Pericope-final; its forward bridge is cross-pericope (FIG_0156 fulfilled at the gate), which is outside this pericope's link scope.

No further decomposition needed. The 13 MM-granularity propositions are already at appropriate grain; where a single proposition carried command+compliance (P4) or measure+lay (P5) I folded the second beat into the proposition's slots rather than splitting. Flags are anchored by the verses given.

remarks: Five mints flagged for review: arc_element SECRECY_INJUNCTION and EMPTYING_REVERSED; proposition_kind LAY_DOWN (P1), MEASURED_OUT (P5), SHOWED (P10). Reused SPOKE for P8/P9/P11 (question/report/reported-instruction) with distinguishing speech_acts to avoid further proposition_kind mints — reviewer may prefer dedicated kinds. Pericope-wide naming-down is the dominant register feature: every participant is given a marked unnamed referential_form (HA_ISHAH_THE_WOMAN, HA_ISH_THE_MAN, HER_MOTHER_IN_LAW_CHAMOT, MY_DAUGHTER_INTIMATE) per the MM's explicit 'no names at all' note. S1 scene_kind INSTRUCTION_SCENE has a real near-miss in DEPARTURE_SCENE. B3 appended to S1 as REFERENCED on the gap's hint (the gift's homeward aim).
